files.notes: The file contains two complete articles. The first is a long story 'Investing in Love' by Annie D. Palmer that spans most of the content. The second article 'The Use of Mental Tests' by Lofter Bjarnason begins clearly with its own title and author byline and appears to be cut off mid-sentence at the end of the file.

files.notes: This file contains the complete Guide Lessons for January with 4 distinct lesson sections: Lesson I (Theology), Lesson II (Work and Business - appears to be just a header with no content), Lesson III (Literature focusing on Walt Whitman), and Lesson IV (Social Service on family budgets plus Teachers' Topic on health). The lessons are clearly delineated by Roman numeral headings and subject matter changes.
